metadata.description: AdWeave plugin — stable channel (pinned releases). For bleeding-edge see adweave-ai/adweave-claude-plugin.

plugins.name: adweave
plugins.description: Opinionated B2C SaaS / DTC marketing workflow for Meta Ads via the AdWeave MCP. Ships the daily creative engine, metrics feedback loop, ad launch, creative production, and competitor research as a set of composable skills.
